zh.lifeSummary: 當Philip Gogh de Egerton於大約1197年出生在英國爾馬爾帕斯時，他的父親Sir Dan David le Clerk28歲，母親Catherine Vaughan29歲。他於大約1227年與Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1272年在他的家鄉享年76歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Philip Gogh de Egerton于大约1197年出生在英国爾馬爾帕斯时，他的父亲Sir Dan David le Clerk28岁，母亲Catherine Vaughan29岁。他于大约1227年与Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1272年在他的家乡享年76岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Egerton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire and Lancashire): variant of   Edgerton  .

variants.name: Edgerton
meanings: English (West Midlands): habitational name from any of various places called Egerton in Cheshire and Kent, Egerton in Wheathill (Shropshire), Egerton in Bolton le Moors (Lancashire), Egerton in Scammonden (Yorkshire), or Edgerton in Huddersfield (Yorkshire). Egerton in Kent is from the Old English personal name Ecgheard + Old English tūn ‘estate, farmstead’ (see Eckert ), but Egerton in Chesire is more likely to derive from the Old English personal name Ecghere (in which the second element is Old English here ‘army’) + Old English tūn.

nameMeanings.name: Philip
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From the Greek name Philippos, meaning ‘lover of horses’, from philein ‘to love’ + hippos ‘horse’. This was popular in the classical period and since. It was the name of the father of Alexander the Great . It was also the name of one of Christ's apostles, of a deacon ordained by the apostles after the death of Christ, and of several other early saints. See also Philippa .

nameMeanings.name: Gogh
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Slovak: probably a nickname from the same root as   Gogol  .
Czech: presumably a nickname from Middle High German gogel ‘lively, boisterous, frolicsome’. Alternatively, it may be of Slovak origin (see above).
Albanian: ethnic name or nickname from the archaic/informal term gogë (definite form goga) ‘Vlach, Aromanian, foreigner’ (see Vlachos ), figuratively also ‘boorish, crude’.

variants.name: Gogol
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Danuta, Janusz, Andrzej, Darek, Jozef, Stanislawa.

Polish (rarely Gogoł), Ukrainian, and Jewish (from Ukraine): from Polish gogoł, Ukrainian gogol ‘wild duck, mallard’, a nickname denoting a wildfowler or acquired on account of some other association with the bird. The Jewish name may be artificial.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Philip Gogh de Egerton was born about 1197, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Dan David le Clerk, was 28 and his mother, Catherine Vaughan, was 29. He married Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton about 1227. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1272, in his hometown, at the age of 76.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Philip Gogh d’Egerton est né environ 1197, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Dan David le Clerk, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Catherine Vaughan, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton environ 1227. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1272, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 76 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Philip Gogh de Egerton um 1197 in Malpas, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Dan David le Clerk 28 und seine Mutter Catherine Vaughan 29. Er hat um 1227 Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1272 im Alter von 76 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Gogh de Egerton è nato il circa 1197 nel Malpas, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Dan David le Clerk, aveva 28 anni e il suo madre, Catherine Vaughan, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton circa 1227. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1272, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 76 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Philip Gogh de Egertonが約1197年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで生まれた時，父Sir Dan David le Clerkは28歳，母Catherine Vaughanは29歳であった。約1227年にKatherine ferch Iorwerth de Hultonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1272年に故郷で76歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Philip Gogh de Egerton(이)가 대략 1197년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Dan David le Clerk(은)는 28세였고, 그의 어머니 Catherine Vaughan(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1227년 Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1272년 그의 고향에서 76세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Philip Gogh de Egerton nasceu aproximadamente 1197, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Dan David le Clerk, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Catherine Vaughan, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton aproximadamente 1227. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1272, em sua cidade natal, com 76 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Philip Gogh de Egerton родился около 1197 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Dan David le Clerk было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Catherine Vaughan, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton около 1227 г. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1272 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 76 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Philip Gogh de Egerton nació aproximadamente 1197, en Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Dan David le Clerk, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Catherine Vaughan, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Katherine ferch Iorwerth de Hulton aproximadamente 1227. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1272, en su pueblo, a la edad de 76 años.
